scripts.build:pre: cargo run --release --color=always --package nyar-prebuild --bin nyar-prebuild && cargo fmt --all
scripts.wasm:build: cargo component build --release --target wasm32-wasip2 --package valkyrie-wasm32-wasi && npx jco transpile target/wasm32-wasip2/release/valkyrie_wasm32_wasi.wasm -o projects/valkyrie-playground/src/lib --map "valkyrie:wasm32-wasi/*=./*" --no-typescript
